violations.text: There is insufficient refrigeration equipment/capacity to maintain a temperature of 41 degrees or below. PIC instructed to add a refrigerator/freezer to store cold foods. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2023

The refrigeration prep unit, ice machine, and beverage stations at the bar have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2023
Handwashing sink is in poor repair. Inspector observed leakage at handwashing sink in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2023
The floor and wall junctures in the kitchen do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2023

The walls and floors (missing tiles) in the kitchen area behind handwashing sink and prep unit refrigerator is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2023

The walls and floors in the kitchen area have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2023
Ventilation system in poor repair. Inspector observed ventilation system and insulation exposed over the food preparation area. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2023
